regulatory_body: FDA / Global Promotional Materials Review Board

safety_integrity_rules.grounding_rule: Every efficacy claim must be immediately accompanied by its corresponding safety parameter from the approved claims registry. No net-new clinical claims or efficacy claims may be generated or hallucinated.
safety_integrity_rules.claim_exactness: The numerical values (percentages, survivals, distances) stated in the marketing copy must match the active claims database EXACTLY. Discrepancies are flagged as CRITICAL and auto-healed.
safety_integrity_rules.safety_prominence_ratio: Safety disclosures must be displayed in a readable, prominent font (min 0.75rem) and must not be hidden in tiny text or overlay containers.

layout_integrity_rules.header_h1_typo_scale: Main headline must be wrapped in H1 tag using corporate design typographic scale (2.25rem, font-weight 800).
layout_integrity_rules.legal_footer_margin: There must be a legal footer section at the very bottom with a minimum margin-top of 40px and a top border of 1px solid to prevent layout overlap with marketing copy.
layout_integrity_rules.background_transparency: All content sections below the hero image must use transparent backgrounds to let the primary corporate dark gradient show through, avoiding solid white boxes.
